events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! His legendary riffs have powered some of the biggest anthems in rock history.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Still strutting and rocking at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, the inimitable voice of The Rolling Stones.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed the game for music forever. Remember the irony of its first video?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A massive 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation and still sounds absolutely biblical.

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a three-day festival of peace and music, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His music and influence are eternal.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a pivotal figure in 90s hip-hop, was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His voice and lyrics continue to resonate decades after his passing.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Today, we pay tribute to the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' legendary 'Abbey Road' album was released 57 years ago. That album cover is still one of the most famous of all time.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye's iconic vocalist Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was originally released as a single on October 11, 1971, in the US and October 24, 1971, in the UK.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity is as powerful today as it ever was.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Who remembers their first one?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to celebrate 007's enduring legacy with some iconic theme tunes and classic cinema moments.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Music legend and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940. He would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision and music continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
